subject: v1.8.1
body: ## [1.8.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v1.8.0...v1.8.1) (2016-08-24) ### Bug Fixes * **searchBox:** handle BFCache browsers (#1212) ([7deb9c3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/7deb9c3)) * **toggle:** make autoHide check facetValue.count (#1213) ([86872eb](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/86872eb))
